title: クレーンゲームに挑戦！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, while out and about with King Halo...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Look! Those cute plushies look as though they're
sending me their praises!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo points toward a claw machine filled
with Umamusume plushies.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, wouldn't it be stellar to add them to my
ever-growing support group, the Halo Army?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
It's decided! I'm granting you the right to win and
collect those plushies for me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course, you! Isn't that part of your job as my
trainer?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Now, go be a good first-rate trainer and show off
those claw machine skills!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, I'll be with you the entire time! Give
it your all!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
